# [PUB-01] TRI-NET positioning whitepaper bundle (Zenodo)

> Plan ID `PUB-01` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

✅ **Done at the line-wide level.** The TRI-NET stack provenance bundle
is pinned at Zenodo DOI
[10.5281/zenodo.19227877](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19227877).
γ-side positioning material is in [`LINEUP.md`](../../LINEUP.md)
§Whitepaper / value proposition.

## Evidence in this repo

- DOI cited in `docs/INTERCONNECT_PROTOCOL_V1.md` and
  `docs/CROSS_TILE_INTERCONNECT.md`.
- γ-side value-prop summary: [`LINEUP.md`](../../LINEUP.md).
- Restrained competitor framing: [`COMPETITORS.md`](../../COMPETITORS.md).

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] DOI exists and is cited in at least one repo-internal artefact.
- [x] γ-side value-prop section in `LINEUP.md`.
- [x] No silicon claim added by the positioning text.

## R5 honesty

- DOI `10.5281/zenodo.19227877` is the **only** DOI asserted by this
  repo. Any other DOI mentioned in line-wide planning material is
  `VERIFY` until it lands in a repo artefact.
- The bundle is a **positioning** record, not a peer-reviewed paper.
